prompt: Change the theme to a light mode color scheme.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1, changing the entire mobile app's current dark theme to a light mode color scheme. This involves converting the black background to a light color (e.g., white or light gray) and the white text and icons to a dark color (e.g., black or dark gray).
objects: Top status bar (with time, signal, battery icons)
Post text content (including timestamps and reply counts)
Post interaction icons (like, comment, share, bookmark)
App bottom navigation bar (home, search, create, likes, profile icons)
Android system navigation bar (bottom system buttons)
